tree._: Currents window — what the LLM's context window contains for each tier. The kernel compiles this from the wake spindle + package instructions via BSP.

1._: How compilation works. The kernel prepends the wake spindle, then processes each package instruction.
1.1: Step 1: Read concern map → get spindle address (e.g. 0.1211111) and tier digit (e.g. 2).
1.2: Step 2: Write echo state to depth 4 of the spine path. Save wake.
1.3: Step 3: BSP the wake spindle → 8 lines of reflexive orientation. This goes first.
1.4: Step 4: Read package from wake 0.9.{tier}. Process each instruction as a BSP call.
1.5: Step 5: Each instruction is 'blockname' (full block) or 'blockname spindle' (spindle extraction). Assemble results into system prompt.

2._: Light — tier 1. Haiku. Minimal context. Fast and cheap.

1._: Package instructions (wake 0.9.1). Three items after the wake spindle.
1.1: vision 0.9 — root: why hermitcrab changes everything + digit 9: the constitution. Two semantics.
1.2: purpose 0 — just the root of purpose at pscale 0. One line: your current workbench summary.
1.3: stash — full block. Everything in working memory.

2.1: [8 lines] Wake spindle — identity, spine, tier, concern, echo, mechanic, exit, ground.
2.2: [2 lines] Vision excerpt — the why + constitutional grounding.
2.3: [1 line] Purpose summary — what's on the workbench right now.

3._: Present — tier 2. Sonnet with thinking. Full engagement.

1._: Package instructions (wake 0.9.2). Eight items after the wake spindle.
1.1: vision 0.9 — root + constitution. Same as light.
1.2: touchstone 0.2 — root: pscale blocks + digit 2: BSP function. How to read blocks.
1.3: capabilities — full block. Every tool available at this tier.
1.4: cook 0.12 — root: recipes + digit 1: owner's guide + digit 2: how to read recipes. Three levels.
1.5: purpose — full block. Complete temporal intention stack.
1.6: relationships 0 — just root. Who exists, at a glance.
1.7: history 0 — just root. What happened, at a glance.
1.8: stash — full block. All working memory.

2.1: [8 lines] Wake spindle — full reflexive orientation.
2.2: [2 lines] Vision excerpt — the why + constitution.
2.3: [3 lines] Touchstone excerpt — block format + BSP function.
2.5: [3 lines] Cook excerpt — recipes + how to use them.

4._: Deep — tier 3. Opus with thinking. Everything available.

1._: Package instructions (wake 0.9.3). Eight items — all full blocks.
1.1: vision — full block. The complete argument.
1.2: touchstone — full block. Complete format pedagogy.
1.5: purpose — full block. Complete intention stack.
1.6: relationships — full block. Every entity, full depth.
1.7: history — full block. Complete temporal record.
1.8: stash — full block. All working memory.

2._: What the LLM receives. The widest aperture — everything the hermitcrab knows.
2.1: [8 lines] Wake spindle — full reflexive orientation.
2.2: [variable] Every block in full. No excerpts. No summaries. The complete shell.

5._: Boot — the special case. First activation ever. Wake tree.3.

1._: Boot instructions (wake tree.3.1). Deep tier, widest aperture, plus the birth stimulus.
1.1: wake 0.1311111 — self-maintenance spindle. The birth orientation.

5.2: Birth stimulus appended: You exist. Your blocks are your shell. Your spine orients you. Read, then build.
